visual_base.visual_narrative_log: (1) An adult male with short brown hair is crouched in a snowboarding stance in an empty airport waiting area. He wears a white long-sleeve sweater with a blue graphic on the front and grey cargo pants. The lighting is bright and even from overhead ceiling tiles. (2) The scene cuts to the same man in the same crouching pose, now outdoors on a sidewalk next to a metal fence and a street with a bus in the distance. He is wearing a tan backpack. (3) He is then shown in the same pose on a paved plaza in front of a Starbucks Coffee storefront. People are visible in the background background. (4) The man is now indoors in a living room, crouched on the edge of a grey sofa while wearing a black snowboarding helmet and goggles. A small wooden table and an orange chair are behind him. (5) He appears on a red athletic track or street with trees and buildings in the background, still maintaining the crouched snowboarding pose. (6) He is shown inside a modern building with purple and green lighting, possibly a mall or arcade, holding a white face mask and wearing a red crossbody bag. (7) He is crouched inside a clothing retail store with racks of jackets behind him, wearing a white and grey winter jacket. (8) He is in another retail store, this time wearing a vibrant purple and yellow ski jacket, still in the same pose. (9) Finally, the man is on an actual snowy slope in full gear including orange pants and a patterned jacket. He is standing on a snowboard but immediately falls forward onto his face into the deep snow. He then rolls over and smiles widely at the camera.
visual_base.text_narrative_log: (1) [Slogan]: POV:當你以為滑雪很簡單. (2) [Logo]: Starbucks Coffee. (3) [Logo]: BURTON.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 main male creator, 1 female staff member briefly in the background of a store, and distant pedestrians in the Starbucks scene.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: The main character is an adult male with short dyed brown hair. He changes outfits multiple times, moving from a casual white sweater and grey pants to various winter jackets, eventually wearing full snowboarding gear including orange trousers, a patterned jacket, a helmet, and goggles.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: The video features a rapid montage of locations: a sterile airport lobby with rows of grey seats, a city sidewalk, a Starbucks entrance, a domestic living room with floral wallpaper, an urban athletic area, a brightly lit mall, two different clothing stores, and a snowy ski resort with a snow groomer in the distance.

audio_base.audio_narrative_log: (1) High-energy, upbeat pop-rock music begins with a driving drum beat and bright synthesizer layers. The tempo is steady and energetic. (2) The music remains the primary audio feature through the montage of visual cuts, maintaining a consistent intensity. (3) A muffled, low-frequency percussive thud occurs as the character impacts the snow. (4) Immediately following the thud, a male voice erupts in high-pitched, genuine laughter characterized by a rising pitch contour and high emotional arousal.

narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video uses a humorous 'Expectation vs. Reality' structure. The creator builds comedic tension by practicing a cool snowboarding pose in increasingly absurd everyday locations (airport, coffee shop, living room), suggesting high competence. The narrative payoff occurs in the final scene where, upon actually reaching the snow, he immediately fails and falls, subverting the built-up expectation for entertainment.

endorsement_analysis.endorsementCues: The appearance of Starbucks and Burton logos are incidental to the environment and the creator's personal gear.

high_inference.freeDescribe: The video relies heavily on the 'jump cut' editing technique synchronized with the upbeat BGM to create a comedic rhythm. The contrast between the 'pro' posing in city settings and the literal face-plant on the slopes is the central gag.
